name: Another Man's Trash
additional_info: If the player you are mugging doesn't have any Notes, you will still take any unequipped equipment. You cannot steal Soulbound or Enchanted items. Gain +0.001% damage for every 1 Weight you're carrying. Every 100 Weight = +1% damage.
desc: Take unequipped equipment when mugging a player. Gain a little more damage against PvE the more you are currently carrying.
